definition: A third-party vendor engaged by a primary data processor to handle personal data on their behalf, subject to contractual safeguards.
extendedDefinition: A third-party vendor engaged by a primary data processor to handle personal data on their behalf, subject to contractual safeguards.
description: Sub-Processor. A third-party vendor engaged by a primary data processor to handle personal data on their behalf, subject to contractual safeguards.
